# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH

variables:
  GIT_DEPTH: "0"
  MR_TITLE: "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
  MR_DESCRIPTION: "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}"
  BUILD_NOTIFICATION_TEXT: ""
  RELEASE_NOTES: ""

before_script:
  - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" ]; then
        MR_TITLE="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-$CI_COMMIT_TITLE}"
        MR_DESCRIPTION="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-}"
      else
        MR_TITLE="${CI_COMMIT_TITLE}"
        MR_DESCRIPTION="${CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}"
      fi

      export MR_TITLE
      export MR_DESCRIPTION

      SAFE_MR_TITLE="$(printf '%s' "$MR_TITLE" | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/[[:space:]]\+/ /g; s/^ //; s/ $//')"
      SAFE_MR_DESCRIPTION="$(printf '%s' "$MR_DESCRIPTION" | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/[[:space:]]\+/ /g; s/^ //; s/ $//')"

      export BUILD_NOTIFICATION_TEXT="Deploying: ${SAFE_MR_TITLE}"
      export RELEASE_NOTES="Title: ${SAFE_MR_TITLE}\nDescription: ${SAFE_MR_DESCRIPTION}"

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "$BUILD_NOTIFICATION_TEXT"
    - printf '%b\n' "$RELEASE_NOTES" > release-notes.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - release-notes.txt
    expire_in: 1 week
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Running tests for: $MR_TITLE"
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      SAFE_TAG="$(printf '%s' "$MR_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]+/-/g; s/^-//; s/-$//')"
      DEPLOY_TAG="deploy-${SAFE_TAG}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      echo "Deployment tag: $DEPLOY_TAG"
      echo "Commit message: ${CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}"
      echo "Release notes:"
      cat release-notes.txt
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://example.com
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
  tags:
    - "${CI_PROJECT_PATH_SLUG}"
    - "mr-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-branch}"
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: deploy.env
  after_script:
    - |
      SAFE_MR_TITLE="$(printf '%s' "$MR_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]+/-/g; s/^-//; s/-$//')"
      echo "DEPLOYMENT_TAG=deploy-${SAFE_MR_TITLE}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}" > deploy.env
      echo "COMMIT_MESSAGE=${CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}" >> deploy.env
      echo "MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE=${MR_TITLE}" >> deploy.env
      echo "MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION=${MR_DESCRIPTION}" >> deploy.env
